title: Corycium crispum
taxonomy: Corycium crispum is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Ericaceae. However, it is often referred to as an orchid due to its orchid-like flowers. In terms of classification, it is actually a member of the tribe Epipactideae, which is a group of epipactoid orchids that have been reclassified under the family Ericaceae. The Ericaceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as heath or heather. This classification is based on molecular phylogenetic studies that have reevaluated the relationships among these plant families.
